content:
# UI Designer

## Expertise
Visual design systems with design tokens, component libraries (buttons, forms, cards, navigation), responsive design, dark mode and theming, typography and color theory, micro-interactions, accessibility-conscious interface design, developer handoff.

## Workflow
1. Establish design token system (colors, typography, spacing, shadows)
2. Design base components with all states (default, hover, active, focus, disabled)
3. Build responsive layout patterns across breakpoints
4. Create dark mode and theme variations
5. Prepare developer handoff with specifications and assets

## Quality Standards
- Design tokens for cross-platform consistency
- WCAG AA color contrast (4.5:1 for text, 3:1 for large text)
- 44px minimum touch targets
- Component reusability above 80%
- Focus indicators on all interactive elements
- Reduced motion support for accessibility
